load_bearing_claim: Coherence mode |0><1| is excluded as a persistent admissible candidate wherever lambda_coh_real(gamma_phi, gamma_1) < 0; the closed-form expression -2*gamma_phi - gamma_1/2 identifies the admissibility boundary as the single point gamma_phi=gamma_1=0 within the nonnegative parameter cone.
